episodes.title: Japan's AI Alliance: Can Industry Beat Giants? — Apr 13
episodes.summary: Japan's top industrial and financial firms are uniting with SoftBank to build a sovereign AI foundation, reducing reliance on US and Chinese models. Meanwhile, AI adoption in healthcare, finance, and manufacturing is accelerating, with measurable gains in efficiency and decision speed — though deployment gaps and security risks persist.
source_titles: Steel giants, automakers, and banks plan to build Japan's answer to US and Chinese AI dominance

episodes.title: Gemma 4 vs. Agent Limits: On-Device Power Meets Real-World Gaps — Apr 13
episodes.summary: Google's Gemma 4 brings powerful, private agentic AI to phones with full on-device processing, while new research reveals that agent skills often fail under real conditions. Meanwhile, startups and labs are pushing open models, edge deployment, and smarter tool use—highlighting both the promise and pitfalls of today’s AI agents.
source_titles: Google's Gemma 4 puts free agentic AI on your phone and no data ever leaves the device
